'''Beruga''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] until she was inadvertently saved by [[Nim Abek]], whom she repaid with a [[Life debt/Legends|life debt]] by becoming his pilot for life. Her room on [[Abek's Station]] was adorned with starfighter memorabilia as well as a poster of the famous starfighter tactician [[Adar Tallon/Legends|Adar Tallon]]. Beruga had brown and black fur.<ref name="SSS" />

{{Char-stub}}
